textPlain: And I’m so glad to see them take a big, glorious L after the changes were back-pedaled a day later.

Trump already back-pedaled the H1B changes. They're one-time, instead of annual, now and don't apply to existing visas. Much like this "operation", the change will achieve nothing now.https://www.wsj.com/politics/policy/trumps-100-000-h-1b-visa...
